properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In this age of confusion There's dissolution every where It's hard to find true peace of mind Or someone who really cares

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have put my trust in Jesus He's like no other man I know His word is true He will see me through I believe Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe, Jesus saves I believe a crown of life awaits beyond the grave I believe the path the saints have trod That a prayer can touch the heart of God I believe the old time ways I believe Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Though this world has refused Him Though we abuse Him, He still lives His grief and pain were for our gain So that our Lord might freely give

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Faith to overcome each trial The grace to live in victory His nail scared hands wrote salvation's plan I believe Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I believe, Jesus saves I believe a crown of life awaits beyond the grave I believe the path the saints have trod That a prayer can touch the heart of God I believe the old time ways I believe Jesus
